phrases.intent_en: Where is the Sonho de Creme?
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde posso encontrar o Sonho de Creme?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW SOH-nyoo DIH KREH-mih?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional Portuguese pastries are prominently displayed in the front glass case for easy customer selection and quick service.

likely_response.local: Fica na vitrine, bem à sua frente.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NUH veet-REE-nih, BAYNG AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: It's in the display case, right in front of you.

responses.english: It's in the display case, right in front of you.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NUH veet-REE-nih, BAYNG AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
responses.local: Fica na vitrine, bem à sua frente.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Sonho de Creme?
phrases.text_local: Onde está o Sonho de Creme?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW SOH-nyoo DIH KREH-mih?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pastry shops, items are typically displayed in a glass case (vitrine). You can point to the one you want.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na vitrine de doces.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's in the sweets display case.

responses.english: Good morning, it's in the sweets display case.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, está na vitrine de doces.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pick up my receipt?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso levantar o meu recibo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW MEHOO reh-SEE-boo?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese bakeries, receipts are typically collected at a designated counter spot immediately after payment to maintain queue flow.

likely_response.local: Pode levantar o recibo na caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW reh-SEE-boo NUH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pick up the receipt at the cashier.

responses.english: You can pick up the receipt at the cashier.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW reh-SEE-boo NUH KEYE-shuh.
responses.local: Pode levantar o recibo na caixa.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get takeaway bags?
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro os sacos para levar para casa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OOSH SAH-koosh PUH-ruh lih-VAHR PUH-ruh KAH-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Takeaway packaging is usually organized in a dedicated station near the pickup area to speed up service during peak hours.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na caixa ou a um empregado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH KEYE-shuh OHW AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the cashier or a server.

responses.english: Ask at the cashier or a server.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH KEYE-shuh OHW AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo.
responses.local: Pergunte na caixa ou a um empregado.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar pelo meu pedido?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR PEH-loo MEHOO peh-DEE-doo?

likely_response.translation_en: Where can I pay for my order? Go to the cashier to pay.

responses.english: Where can I pay for my order? Go to the cashier to pay.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o caixa para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh PUH-ruh puh-GAHR?

likely_response.local: Junto à vitrine de doces, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: ZHOONNG-too AH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The cashier is at the pastry display, with the server.

responses.english: The cashier is at the pastry display, with the server.
responses.phonetic: ZHOONNG-too AH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: Junto à vitrine de doces, à esquerda.

phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pastry shops, it's common to form a single line at the counter. Asking where the queue starts is perfectly acceptable and staff will point you in the right direction. Queues are generally orderly.

likely_response.local: A fila única é ali, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH FEE-luh OO-nee-kuh EH uh-LEE, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The single queue is over there, on the right.

responses.english: The single queue is over there, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AH FEE-luh OO-nee-kuh EH uh-LEE, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: A fila única é ali, à direita.
